human_actions_pending.context: Multiple cascading changes landed without a full playtest

decisions.decision: Player-enemy collision uses overlap-area delta (block only if move increases overlap)
decisions.rationale: Naive block-on-intersect stuck the player when enemies walked into them. Overlap-area approach always allows escape while preventing entry.

decisions.decision: Enemy-enemy separation is post-movement pairwise pushback in FarmScene.ResolveEnemySeparation
decisions.rationale: Simpler than integrating into AI; O(n^2) fine for current enemy counts. Boss is treated as immovable, minions are pushed the full distance.

decisions.decision: ToolController derives EquippedTool from active hotbar item id, not keybinds
decisions.rationale: User wants Stardew-style: tools are inventory items on hotbar, dragging out -> Hands. H/G/R/F/C keys removed.

decisions.decision: SpriteAtlas refactored to (texture, rect) per sprite
decisions.rationale: Tool icons live on Tool_Icons_NO_Outline.png (separate from items sheet); hand.png is its own 16x16 file. Multi-texture lookup needed.

decisions.decision: tool_hoe mapped to lamparina column (index 8) as placeholder
decisions.rationale: Sheet has no hoe icon; user approved lamparina as temp.

next_action: Finish tools refactor: draw hand.png in empty active hotbar slot (spriteId tool_hand). Then playtest combat + tools. Then commit everything.
context_notes: Two big refactors landed without playtest in this session: (1) player-enemy + enemy-enemy collision, (2) tools-as-hotbar-items. Build is clean (0 errors). ToolController constructor signature changed — now takes InventoryManager. HUD constructor still takes ToolController but no longer renders the [Tool] label.
